Thesis: CleanMax is a high-quality infrastructure compounder with exceptional revenue visibility (22.85-year PPAs), a powerful AI demand tailwind (42% DC/AI clients), and strong management (McKinsey pedigree + Brookfield governance). However, at CMP ₹1,120, the stock trades 27% above our base entry zone of ₹883. The thin profitability (PAT ₹86 Cr on ₹1,913 Cr revenue), high leverage (Net Debt/EBITDA 4.75x), and very high P/E (~154x) demand patience. The company is in a heavy investment phase — as capacity ramps and interest costs moderate post-deleveraging, earnings should accelerate significantly.
